offer: For property managers processing 10–20 compliance reports/month, manual preparation causes late submissions and potential fines. We automate report generation instead of manual report preparation using spreadsheets.
problem: Manual preparation of compliance reports is time-consuming and prone to errors.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on compliance tools
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Share insights in property management forums
try_it: Let users try template-based report generation for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 brief interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
